title: gilia gracilis var. humilior
intro: Gilia gracilis var. humilior, also known as Humility Gilia, is a species of flowering plant in the polemonium family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Gilia gracilis var. humilior include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea or tincture, or used topically as an infusion to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
